name: Force
description: Turning effect of force, torque, center of gravity, uniform circular motion, and centripetal/centrifugal forces.

name: Work, Power & Energy
description: Work done, energy forms, potential/kinetic energy, conservation of energy.

name: Machines
description: Levers, pulley systems, mechanical advantage, velocity ratio, and efficiency.

name: Refraction of Light & Lenses
description: Refraction through glass block, prism, critical angle, total internal reflection, convex and concave lenses.

name: Spectrum
description: Dispersion of light, electromagnetic spectrum, properties and uses of different radiations.

name: Sound
description: Free, forced, and resonant vibrations, echo, sonar, loudness, pitch, and quality of sound.

name: Current Electricity
description: Ohm's Law, resistance, factors affecting resistance, series and parallel circuits, EMF, internal resistance.

name: Household Circuits
description: Three-wire system, main switch, fuse, earthing, two-way switch, and power calculations.

name: Electromagnetism
description: Magnetic effect of current, solenoid, electromagnet, force on a conductor, DC motor, electromagnetic induction, AC generator, and transformer.

name: Modern Physics & Radioactivity
description: Structure of atom, radioactivity, alpha, beta, gamma radiations, background radiation, nuclear fission, and fusion.
